plan_adherence_notes: All 6 plan steps implemented faithfully: compute_orders_pnl with proportional ProbabilityEdit attribution (step 1), get_market_account_pnl with per-outcome breakdown and meta wrapper (step 2), per-market route at len==6 with 405 guard (step 3), get_account_pnl aggregating across all markets (step 4), account-level route in len==4 resource set (step 5), and 11 integration tests covering all specified scenarios (step 6). Minor deviation: plan step 3 said ~line 4535 for routing insertion but actual location is ~line 4884 due to other changes on the branch — functionally correct.
missed_questions: How should net-zero positions (all bought then all sold) be reported — zero P&L row or omitted from outcomes dict?
Thread safety: compute_orders_pnl iterates ORDERS without holding any lock — safe for reads in CPython due to GIL but could be a concern under concurrent writes
reason: Implementation matches plan precisely. All 308 tests pass including 11 new P&L-specific tests. Core P&L logic correctly handles EventTrade cost basis (buy adds, sell subtracts), ProbabilityEdit proportional attribution via absolute marginal changes, unrealized vs realized P&L based on market status, and account-level aggregation across all markets. Response schema uses camelCase with meta wrapper per existing conventions. 404 behavior correctly distinguishes 'never traded' from 'zero P&L'. The two missed questions are minor edge cases that don't block approval.
